implementedReadOnlyNotes.client: list + plan plus preview-only export; install/config-writing export not implemented yet
implementedReadOnlyNotes.lab: fixture inventory, readiness matrix, gap report, and scenario drill-down
implementedReadOnlyNotes.init: bootstrap only; seeds local state layout and reports readiness
implementedReadOnlyNotes.hub: local lifecycle/state/log/repair surface; no live stdio/http ingress or lease engine yet
implementedReadOnlyNotes.stdio-shim: bootstrap-only proof surface; normalizes context and ensures hub up but does not forward live MCP stdio traffic
